portable_rows.why_portable: This is methodology, not board-specific semantics.
The winning path came from preserving entry and improving downside execution rather than endlessly heating entry.

portable_rows.rule: inside the dominant drawdown window, deepen impulse-target de-risk before touching broader entry or symbol tuning
portable_rows.why_portable: This is a grammar about repairing the largest economic leak first.

portable_rows.rule: after main-window repair, check post-window weak-drift tail giveback before more local alpha discovery
portable_rows.why_portable: The sequence main-window then tail was economically justified by the portability audit.

portable_rows.rule: only promote when higher equity, lower-or-equal drawdown, and lower-or-equal order count all improve together
portable_rows.why_portable: This is the same frontier discipline that prevented false promotions in CPO and sharpened commercial-aerospace promotion quality.

local_only_rows.why_local_only: This board archetype must not be mixed with CPO-style sustained diffusion boards.
The exact chronology windows are commercial-aerospace specific.
The named rule is specific to this board's regime semantics and replay path.
These are board-specific symbol findings and should not be ported as generic priors.
The current grammar is portable enough to package, but its measured concentration is still a board-specific audit result.

interpretation: V1.28K packages the commercial-aerospace primary into portable methodology versus local-only board semantics.
This is not a migration itself; it is the guardrail that prevents future cross-board transfer from mixing transferable grammar with commercial-aerospace-specific chronology and symbol facts.
